titleStmt.title: SII 16.303: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 303. (A.R. No. 258 of 1916.) ŚRĪMUSHṆAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Bhūvarāhaperumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1514, Nandana, Śrāvaṇa ba. 5, corresponding to 1592 A.D., August 17, (Tuesday).

States that Chilaṁbūru in the Kurichipaṭṭu sub-division of Paḷḷikoṇḍapaṭṇamsīma formerly obtained by Avasaram-Kōnappa as an agrahāra from Koṇḍama-nāyaka, son of Timmarasu and grandson of Haṇḍeriga Gaṅgādharayya was granted by him (Kōnappa) to god Ādivarāha-Perumāḷ in lieu of which the Śrībhaṇḍāraṁvāru of the temple gave the donor 500 kuṇṭas of garden land and two house-sites in addition to a share in the offerings made to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujāya namaḥ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1517 Agunaneṭi naṁdanasaṁvatsara śrāvaṇa bahula 5 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraveṁkkaṭapatidēvamahārāyaluṁgāru penugoṁḍa nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulayi pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ
sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭibraṁhmāṁḍanāyakulayina śrīmuṣṇaṁ Ādivarāha perumāḷakōvila śrībhaṁḍāraṁvā
ru bhāradvājagōtram Āśvalāyanasūtra rukuśākhādhyāyulaina haṁḍeriga gaṁgādharaya pautṛlayina tiṁmarusu putṛṁḍaina Avasaraṁ kōna
ppaku yiccina silāśāsanakramameṭlannanu koṁḍamanāyanigāru nīku Agrahārānakuṁ gānu naḍapukoṁmani yicina pallikoṁḍāpaṭnaṁsīmalōni
kuricipattulōni cilaṁbūrugrāmaṁ Ādivarāhaperumāḷlaku samarpaṇa śēstivi ganaka yiṁdulaku Ādivarāha perumāḷaku nityapaḍi
tarānaku Āmudupaḍi Ó 1 . 2 Akṣarālānu yiruvaitūmulu parupu tūmeḍu nēyi nēru Aṁduku tagga porikariyamudulu cārlu mōrlu ti
rupaṇyārālu dōśalu 51 nni vaḍalu 51 nni Appaṁ 51 nni Atirasālu 51 nni caṁdana palaṁ 1 Aḍikāyamudu palaṁ 1 Ākulu 51 nni Ādimū
rtti prasāda labdhaṁgānu viṭavanviḍukāḍu ceturthāṁśānaku kala svataṁtrāluṁnnu tōṁṭaku yēnūru kuṁṭalu nēla nivēśanālu reṁḍuṁnu Istimi gana
ka nī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu dānādivinimayavikrayayōgyaṁ Agunaṭṭugānu Ā caṁdrārkkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁcēdi Ani Iccina silāśāsanamu
yī toṁpu 500 guṁṭalā phalānaku vaccina mīdanu vaccinaphalamu valananu tōṁpu cēśē manuṣyula saṁbaḷaṁ pōṁgā nilicinaṁdu
lōnu caturthāṁśaṁ mīku naḍapagalavāramu This is followed by a few words in Grantha and Tamil which are:—
śri kṛṣṇabhaṭṭaA śrivarāhabhaṭṭa r
melppaṭi śri kṛṣṇabhaṭṭa r
Acyutappānāyanivāri nirvāhaṁ Appaya śrīśrīśrīṁjēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.303 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
